error.cause: CLAUDE.md is listed in .gitignore on the target branch
error.stack_trace:
Error: PR creation failed: Failed to add CLAUDE.md
    at handleAutoPrCreation (solve.auto-pr.lib.mjs:1489:11)

timeline.details: Write access confirmed to private repository

root_cause.primary: Missing error handling for git add failure when file is in .gitignore
root_cause.secondary: Target repository has CLAUDE.md in .gitignore on feat/new-alert-page branch

solutions_proposed.title: Move fallback logic to handle git add failures
solutions_proposed.description: Check error message for gitignore pattern and trigger fallback

solutions_proposed.title: Pre-check for .gitignore before creating CLAUDE.md
solutions_proposed.description: Use git check-ignore before attempting to add file

solutions_proposed.title: Use git add -f (force add)
solutions_proposed.description: Always force add CLAUDE.md regardless of .gitignore

solutions_proposed.title: Auto-switch to .gitkeep mode for problematic repos
solutions_proposed.description: Detect gitignored CLAUDE.md and switch to .gitkeep automatically
